title: OIDC + mTLS auth type for Redis State
body:
<!-- If you need to report a security issue please visit https://docs.dapr.io/operations/support/support-security-issues -->

## Describe the feature
As was done with Kafka, add support on top of the [existing Redis component](https://docs.dapr.io/reference/components-reference/supported-state-stores/setup-redis/) for:
- OIDC authentication method
- mTLS 

Including the following
- Support client JWT auth method via oidc using certificates: https://github.com/dapr/components-contrib/pull/4057
- Add kid header to kafka jwt auth: https://github.com/dapr/components-contrib/pull/4099

## Release Note
<!-- How should this new feature be announced in our release notes? It can be populated later. -->
<!-- Keep it as a single line. Examples: -->

<!-- RELEASE NOTE: **ADD** New feature in Dapr. -->
<!-- RELEASE NOTE: **FIX** Bug in runtime. -->
<!-- RELEASE NOTE: **UPDATE** Runtime dependency. -->

RELEASE NOTE: **ADD OIDC + mTLS auth type for Redis**
